7857.one_line_summary: NFT standard for AI agents with private metadata and verifiable data transfer.
7857.notes: Introduces privacy-preserving verification (TEE/ZKP) for agent metadata. Supports data cloning and authorization mechanisms. Complex cryptographic design for intellectual property protection.

7858.one_line_summary: Extends ERC-721 with expiration mechanism for time-limited NFTs and SBTs.
7858.notes: Supports both block-based and timestamp-based expiration. Includes epoch-based extension for batch expiry management. Backward compatible with ERC-721.

7861.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for verifiable credentials with encryption and revocation support.
7861.notes: Enables on-chain credential management with W3C framework alignment. Supports encrypted storage and selective disclosure via ZK proofs. Credential revocation via burning.

7866.one_line_summary: Decentralized user profiles as SBTs with dApp-specific avatars and cross-chain support.
7866.notes: Registry/resolver architecture inspired by ENS. Supports privacy controls for avatar visibility. Off-chain metadata storage (IPFS/Arweave). DIDs for global identification.

7871.one_line_summary: Unified JSON-RPC method for wallet message signing supporting multiple EIP-191 versions.
7871.notes: Consolidates personal_sign, typed data signing under single wallet_sign method. Supports EIP-5792 capabilities. Extensible for future EIP-191 versions.

7876.one_line_summary: Unified JSON configuration specification for EVM networks with extension support.
7876.notes: Standardizes network configuration format for DApps. Includes RPC, contracts, explorers, native currency. Supports EIP-3085 alignment with extensibility via custom properties.

7878.one_line_summary: Inheritance mechanism for tokens via Wills and executors enabling post-mortem transfers.
7878.notes: Mimics real-world Will execution with moratorium period safety buffer. Flexible executor model. Compatible with ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155.

7884.one_line_summary: Protocol for redirecting write operations to external systems (L2, L1, databases).
7884.notes: Enables off-chain/cross-chain operation routing. Uses view functions for determining handlers. Supports storage proofs for database authorization. EIP-712 typed signatures for security.

7887.one_line_summary: Cancelation extension for ERC-7540 asynchronous tokenized vaults.
7887.notes: Adds async cancelation flows with pending/claimable/claimed states. Blocks new requests during cancelation. Complements ERC-7540 vault design.

7888.one_line_summary: Storage-based cross-rollup messaging using state commitments and StateProver contracts.
7888.notes: Trustless interop via storage proofs. Supports various state commitment types (block hashes, state roots). Upgradeable StateProver pattern. Receiver/Broadcaster architecture.

7891.one_line_summary: Hierarchical NFTs enabling splitting and merging with fractional ownership tracking.
7891.notes: Extends ERC-721 and ERC-6150. Supports share redistribution and fractional ownership. Enables dynamic asset restructuring for real estate and gaming use cases.

7893.one_line_summary: Standardized DeFi protocol solvency proof with verifiable health metrics and risk alerts.
7893.notes: Oracle-based asset/liability tracking with solvency ratio calculation (105% min threshold). Multi-tier risk alerts (CRITICAL, HIGH_RISK, WARNING). Historical data for trend analysis. ERC-165 support.

7895.one_line_summary: JSON-RPC method for wallets to create and track hierarchical smart accounts.
7895.notes: Enables universal wallets to manage app-embedded accounts. Supports three use cases: deployed, create, undeployed. Complements EIP-5792 capabilities framework.

7897.one_line_summary: Registry for modular services linked to ERC-4337 wallets using ERC-1167 proxies (WITHDRAWN).
7897.notes: Creates deterministic CREATE2 addresses for wallet-linked services. ERC-1167 minimal proxies with immutable data. Note: Proposal withdrawn; functionality achievable via ERC-7656.

7902.one_line_summary: EIP-5792 capabilities for Account Abstraction including EIP-7702 auth, Paymaster, gas overrides.
7902.notes: Enables dApp/wallet negotiation of AA features. Supports EIP-7702 authorization, static Paymaster config, validity time ranges, multidimensional nonce, gas param overrides.
